content.en:
The first two chapters were written in a hurry, and Tongtian Zhenjin was written as immeasurable real gold, which has been revised

......

"It turned out to be Tongtian real gold, this is a treasure that every Great Ancestor needs, who took it out for auction? Or is it an auction item taken out by Taichen Palace?"

"Taichen Palace will not take out Tongtian True Gold to auction, and there are also a lot of high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fifth stage of Taichen Palace, and they also need Tongtian True Gold. Moreover, if there is really a surplus of Tongtian True Gold, they will definitely use it to cultivate a Great Ancestor, so that he will have super-quality immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood!"

"Yes, Tongtian Zhenjin can help the Infinite Bone break the limit of quality and achieve superior quality. It is rumored that once the immeasurable bone and immeasurable blood reach the super-high quality, the chance of becoming a Heavenly Ancestor can be increased by three percent!"

"To transform the immeasurable bones of the whole body into super-grade quality, it takes three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Tongtian True Gold! And if three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Tongtian True Gold are given to those big forces, they can completely cooperate with other materials to refine the material resources suitable for impacting the Heavenly Ancestor Realm, and maybe they can help several fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to complete a breakthrough!"

"You can't say that, even if you use Tongtian Zhenjin to refine breakthrough resources with other materials, the success rate is not high!

"It's a pity that the amount of Tongtian Zhenjin is too small, even if it is Taichen Palace, it will not store Tongtian Zhenjin for a long time, once you have some, you will definitely use it!"

"I don't care where this piece of innocent gold came from, since I have encountered it, I will auction it!"

Immediately, a group of Great Ancestors began to frantically bid for this piece of pure gold.

At this moment, Ye Tian really saw the desire of this group of great ancestors for Tongtian Zhenjin, and also knew another value of Tongtian Zhenjin from the conversations of other Great Ancestors.

"It turns out that Tongtian True Gold can also be combined with other materials to refine a resource that is conducive to the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms to impact the Heavenly Ancestor level. "

Ye Tian suddenly realized, no wonder these Great Ancestors of the Fifth Stage High-level Immeasurable Lifeforms were so eager to pass through the Heavenly True Gold.

However, even if he knew, he would still use three hundred and sixty-five pieces of Heavenly True Gold to integrate into the Infinite Bone, so that the Infinite Bone would transform into a super-quality.

After all, he has no shortage of innocent gold.

The starting price of Tongtian Zhenjin is very terrifying, reaching 100,000 Tongtian Realm gold coins.

This is just a starting price for a piece of innocent gold, and if it is really sold, its value will reach a terrifying level.

Sure enough, after the auction of this piece of innocent gold, the price continued to soar.

"150,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

"200,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

"300,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

One by one, the Great Ancestors bid frantically, and some even represented the forces behind them.

For many powerful forces that can leave their own realm, it is not difficult to obtain the Tongtian Realm Gold, but if you want to obtain the Tongtian True Gold, it is too difficult, it depends on luck!

Therefore, there is hope of obtaining the true gold, and they will naturally not give up.

Time passed slowly, and the auction price of this piece of innocent gold had soared to a high price of 700,000, and there were still several great ancestors competing.

At this point, these Great Ancestors are almost unable to support it.

"850,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!

A top-notch fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform quoted a new high price, and the other Great Ancestors directly chose to give up.

......

"A piece of Tongtian Realm gold coin was auctioned at a high price of 850,000 Tongtian Realm gold coins, even if Taichen Palace will charge some fees, I will make a lot of money!"

Ye Tian was very excited in his heart, but he was very calm.

Soon, the second piece of Tongtian gold was put up for auction.

"The second piece of Tongtian True Gold, the starting price is still 100,000 Tongtian Gold Coins!"

Xue Yao Ancestor announced.

"What, there's a second piece of Tongtian gold!"

A group of Great Ancestors were extremely surprised, but they were immediately excited.

The first piece of Tongtian True Gold, they didn't grab it, and the second piece of Tongtian True Gold, they didn't want to miss it!

After the second fierce competition, this piece of Tongtian Zhenjin Gold was auctioned off at a high price of 730,000 Tongtian Realm Gold Coins, which was slightly lower than the auction price of the first Tongtian Zhenjin.

Next, Taichen Palace took out pieces of Tongtian gold for auction, attracting one great ancestor after another to bid.

And the auction price of these Tongtian Zhenjin gold eventually reached about 700,000, and the last piece of Tongtian Zhenjin Gold rose to a height, auctioning a terrifying price of 860,000 Tongtian Gold Coins.

......

"This time, I can directly obtain more than seven million Heavenly Realm gold coins, if there are incomparably precious treasures in the back, I can directly auction them off, don't worry about the price!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, some extremely precious treasures were auctioned, but none of them aroused Ye Tian's interest.

Until this one auction item!

"The next auction is an immeasurable supernatural technique, but it is not an ordinary immeasurable supernatural technique, but an immeasurable supernatural power inheritance that is on the immeasurable supernatural power list!"

As soon as Xue Yao's words came out, they directly shocked all the Great Ancestors.

"Xue Yao Great Ancestor, what you said is true? Any of the immeasurable supernatural skills on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers, its power is already incomparably against the sky, once this immeasurable supernatural power technique is practiced, and its own strength has reached the peak realm of the fifth stage, it can threaten the Heavenly Ancestor level!"

"It is rumored that a certain realm gave birth to a demon, mastered several immeasurable supernatural powers on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers, and fought with a heavenly ancestor without falling behind!"

"I've heard of it too, but it's a pity that that Great Ancestor was besieged by several Heavenly Ancestors, and now he doesn't know his whereabouts, and he may have fallen!"

"There are only a total of thirty-six immeasurable supernatural powers on the Infinite Divine Power List, which immeasurable supernatural power is this time?"

Many Great Ancestors were very curious, and Xue Yao Great Ancestor also announced it directly.

"This time, the inheritance of the immeasurable supernatural power is the ten-armed golden body that ranks ninth on the immeasurable supernatural power list!"

Xue Yao Ancestor said.

"What, it's a ten-armed golden body, the cultivation requirements of this immeasurable supernatural power technique are too high!" a great ancestor exclaimed.

"It's a pity, I can't cultivate!" Another Great Ancestor said regretfully: "The ten-armed golden body requires ten specific immeasurable bones to reach the super-high quality, otherwise it will not be able to withstand the requirements of the ten-armed golden body. In fact, it is best to have immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood all over the body to reach the super-quality, otherwise urging the immeasurable golden body for a long time will damage the foundation. "

"In addition, the cultivation resources required by the ten-armed golden body are also extremely rare, and I am definitely not qualified to cultivate. "

A group of Great Ancestors were ready to give up, but there were still Great Ancestors who were interested.

And the starting price of the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body is also very high, directly 1 million Heavenly Realm gold coins!
